'''Kodoos Repulsor Ltd.''' was a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] manufacturing company known for their production of high-end racing [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]]. Contracted by the [[Tetan Guard]] to produce their patrol vehicles, the company sold many other products on the market.<ref name="NoP" />

{{Company-stub}}
